summary: P1 Hardening features fully verified. All 17 battle tests pass (8 folio ledger, 6 learning loop, 3 cancellation edges). All 9 E2E tests pass. Immutable Folio Ledger Service, Learning Loop System, and PMS Battle Tests all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FolioLedgerService correctly implements immutable append-only ledger pattern
Payments stored with negative amounts (reduces balance correctly)
Void entries create new entry with -original_amount (never modify original)
Transfer creates paired entries (transfer_out negative, transfer_in positive)
Idempotency key with unique sparse index prevents duplicate charges
IncidentClassifier auto-classifies based on keyword matching against CLASSIFICATION_RULES
RecurrenceDetector uses pattern_signature (SHA256 of category:subcategory:service) to find similar incidents
RCAEngine tracks full postmortem workflow: create_rca -> track_fix -> create_never_again_rule
Cancellation edge cases handled: confirmed cancel works, double cancel idempotent, checked_out cancel rejected

success_rate.backend: 100% - 17/17 battle tests passed, 9/9 E2E tests passed

seed_data_creation: Test folios and incidents created during E2E tests with unique UUIDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Hardening features fully implemented and tested. Three new systems: 1) Immutable Folio Ledger Service (charge/payment/void/transfer/reconciliation), 2) Learning Loop System (incident classification, RCA, never-again rules, recurrence detection), 3) PMS Battle Tests (cancellation edge cases). All APIs work correctly end-to-end.

post_charge.notes: Creates immutable ledger entry, returns entry_id and new_balance

post_payment.notes: Stores payment with negative amount, reduces balance correctly

void_entry.notes: Creates void entry with -original_amount, marks original as voided

double_void_rejected.notes: Returns 404 when trying to void already voided entry

transfer.notes: Creates paired entries: transfer_out (negative) and transfer_in (positive)

idempotency.notes: Same idempotency_key returns existing entry, no duplicate charges

get_ledger.notes: Returns all entries in sequence order with computed balance

reconciliation.notes: Runs reconciliation for all open folios, returns report with summary

create_incident.notes: Auto-classifies based on keywords, detects recurrence automatically

add_rca.notes: Creates RCA with summary, contributing factors, five whys

never_again_rule.notes: Creates rule with type, description, implementation, verification

recurrence_detection.notes: Detects previous similar incidents based on pattern signature

double_cancel_idempotent.notes: Second cancel returns success or already cancelled
